- Rules/Upgrades and shoot assistant now increases shoot willingness rather than reducing shoot willingness costs
- Allowed accessing other teachers classes even if there isn't a teacher assigned.
- Allowed assigning your teaching assistant and teachers from the class assignment screen.
- Girls in other teacher's classes get XP based off the teacher's stats.
- Grades earned from other teacher's classes scales off their intellect, x0.5 at 0 intellect and x2.0 at 100.

- Removed intellect decay based on girl's corruption.
- Allowed girls and mothers to spend up to $150 on uniform items per day or $50 if they have no set uniform, previously they would only spend $50 and only on uniform items.

Modding Changes: - Added 'global_vote_multiplier' variable which can be modified by rules/upgrades.
- Increased suggested video size from 5MB to 6MB
- Clothing now get their passive stat changes from 'database_clothing_passive_stat_changes' rather than specific clothing tags.
- Girls with clothing type 'category_need' < -5 will not purchase that clothing type.
- Girls with 'clothing_type_wear_chance_modifier' < -5 will not wear that clothing type.
- Fixed inline defined characters not working correctly.
- Added '_panties' and '_bra' fullbody suffix support to go along with '_bottomless' and '_topless', i.e 'clothed_bra' or 'bikini_topless'.
- GirlRating now shows the suggested file size, tag count etc in the warnings.
- Added 'threesome_only' attribute to SexAction, to mark it as threesome action only aka not allowed to be performed by player.
- Changed 'preferred_clothing' function support for locations and jobs to not check for girl methods but separate functions.
- Added 'prevent_home_visit_early_events' which can be set to True to avoid 'home_visit_early' events when answering the door.
- Added 'temp_shoot_end_label' to let modders jump to a label after a shoot ends. Should also set 'temp_skip_shoot_intro_and_outro' to True to skip after shoot dialogue.

- Added 'job_description', 'unlock_requirements', 'requirement_description', 'can_assign' and 'info_screen' parameters to database_job_and_work_hours', notes in 'game/scripts/databases/girl_jobs_database_ren.py'.
